summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of AMFQUEST. Backend: 13/13 pytest tests pass (health, categories, register/duplicate, login wrong/correct, /auth/me with/without token, admin role, contact create + admin list + non-admin 403, training session full flow with answers stripped/review with correct_index, exam session 120 questions + duration 5400s, session list isolation between users, stats). Frontend: All UI flows verified via Playwright: landing page with testids (navbar-logo, hero-cta-primary, nav-login, nav-register), protected route /tableau-de-bord redirects to /connexion when unauthenticated, registration creates account and redirects to dashboard, training flow (start-training -> /quiz/:id -> option-0 -> quiz-next/quiz-finish -> /resultats/:id with result-score and result-percent visible), contact form submission, exam start-exam loads quiz with options, admin login redirects to dashboard. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: Cookies set with secure=False (server.py L69-72) - acceptable for preview behind https proxy but should be secure=True in true production deployment.
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' with allow_credentials=True - browsers will reject credentialed requests with wildcard; ensure CORS_ORIGINS env is set to explicit origin in production.

_build_questions duplicates pool entries when count > pool size by reshuffling, leading to repeated questions in a session (intentional for exam=120, but training count up to 50 might also repeat) - consider deduplication or expanding seed.

Sessions /api/sessions/{id} returns full questions including correct_index for the user; acceptable since session is owned, but could allow client to cheat mid-session if mid-session GET is used. Consider hiding correct_index until finished.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@amfquest.fr / Admin1234! ; created test users have prefix test_user_<ts>@amfquest.fr / Test1234!
seed_data_creation: Test users created during pytest (unique timestamped emails) and one frontend test user. Admin seeded at backend startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all critical flows. Use timestamped emails to avoid collisions. CORS works with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Quiz testids: option-0..3, quiz-next, quiz-finish, result-score, result-percent. Logout testid is nav-logout.
